NO OPPOSITION FILED; MOTION GRANTED, RESPONSES TO BE SERVED BY DECEMBER 1, 2021. SANCTIONS OF $650 IMPOSED AGAINST CHING LIN WANG DBA BESTBUY MARKET SUPPLY. ORDER SIGNED. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Vacated

Motion For An Order (1) Compelling Discovery Responses, (2) Production Of Documents, (3) Deeming The Genuiness Of The Documents And Truth Of Matters Specified In The Request For Admissions, And (4) Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Ching Lin Wang Dba Bestbuy Market Supply
Off Calendar Nov-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Defendants CHING LIN WANG and LINGXIA XU (Tel: 510-688-1678) in pro per;
No other appearances are made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS, LLC's Motion For An Order (1) Compelling Discovery Responses, (2) Production Of Documents, (3) Deeming The Genuiness Of The Documents And Truth Of Matters Specified In The Request For Admissions, And (4) Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Ching Lin Wang dba Bestbuy Market Supply.

The Court informs the defendants that the court did not receive any notice of defendants' intent to appear today to contest the court's tentative ruling. As such, the Court informs the defendants that it must adopt its tentative ruling. The Court informs the defendants that defendants may attempt to proceed with a motion for reconsideration.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. No opposition filed; motion granted, Responses to be served by December 1, 2021. Sanctions of $650 imposed against Ching Lin Wang Dba Bestbuy Market Supply.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Motion For An Order (1) Compelling Discovery Responses, (2) Production Of Documents, (3) Deeming The Genuineness Of The Documents And Truth Of Matters Specified In The Request For Admissions As Admitted, And (4) Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Lingxia Xu Aka Ling Xia Xu.
Off Calendar Nov-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Defendants CHING LIN WANG and LINGXIA XU (Tel: 510-688-1678) in pro per;
No other appearances are made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS, LLC's Motion For An Order (1) Compelling Discovery Responses, (2) Production Of Documents, (3) Deeming The Genuineness Of The Documents And Truth Of Matters Specified In The Request For Admissions As Admitted, And (4) Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Lingxia Xu Aka Ling Xia Xu.

The Court informs the defendants that the court did not receive any notice of defendants' intent to appear today to contest the court's tentative ruling. As such, the Court informs the defendants that it must adopt its tentative ruling. The Court informs the defendants that defendants may attempt to proceed with a motion for reconsideration.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. No opposition filed; motion granted, Responses to be served by December 1, 2021. Sanctions of $650 imposed against Lingxia Xu Aka Ling Xia Xu.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
